title: 7 Retail Stocks to Dump Before the Coming Holiday Sales Slump
text: Usually, the winter season brings levity to people as the holidays approach, but the chilly economic nature this year brings up the uncomfortable topic of retail stocks to sell. Fundamentally, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell indicated that his top priority is controlling inflation.

title: Ross Stores: Benefits From Weak Consumer Sentiment And Supply Glut
text: ROST to benefit from consumers trade-down to cheaper goods. ROST has significant scale advantage over smaller players.

title: Time To Buy More Ross Stores Shares For Less?
text: Ross Stores is a leading and well-run discount apparel retailer with scale, efficiency, sophisticated buyers, and distribution that enable it to provide high-quality apparel at low prices. Ross has captured long-term market share through organic sales growth, increasing store count, and mom-and-pop competitors that lack the sophistication and financial stability to withstand sharp recessions.
